perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A hand holds a mint green ASUS ZenFone 12 Ultra with a golden crown icon and 'CP Value King' text overlay. (2) Three phones in pink, black, and mint green are shown on a desk. (3) Close-ups of the camera module showing '50MP OIS' text. (4) A female model runs in a park at night to demonstrate camera stabilization. (5) Screen recordings show AI object removal on a teddy bear, AI bokeh, noise reduction demo, and AI-generated text summaries. (6) A technical specs page appears listing Snapdragon 8 Elite and 16GB RAM. (7) Final shot shows the three phones standing together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music starts immediately with a male narrator speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin. (2) Ambient sounds of footsteps and night-time park noise are heard during the stabilization demo. (3) BGM continues with high-energy rhythm as technical specifications are listed. (4) Narrator's tone remains professional and persuasive throughout the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '3c有意思tim哥' (Brand Identity). (2) 'CP 值之王 ZenFone' (Hook text - Tone: Exciting). (3) '帶著 AI 回來嚕!' (Hook text - Tone: Enthusiastic). (4) 'Zenfone 12 Ultra 大改形象' (Functional - Informative). (5) '六軸防手震雲台 4.0' (Functional - Technical). (6) AI features labels: '智慧消除', '錄音筆記', '文章摘要' (Functional). (7) Specs: 'Snapdragon 8 Elite', '16GB', '5500mAh', '65W 快充' (Functional).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Visual Showcase -> Performance Demo -> Technical Specs -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator (hand only), 1 female model appearing in camera demos.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male creator shown only by his hands holding the product; female actress in park demo wearing a beige sweater and jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor studio desk with soft purple/pink ambient lighting and an outdoor park environment at night with artificial lights.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Professional studio lighting for product shots and natural/street lighting for outdoor night demos.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Comparative Demo -> Spec Summary -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and promote the ASUS ZenFone 12 Ultra by highlighting its flagship specifications, particularly its AI-enhanced camera stabilization, noise reduction, and productivity tools, targeting consumers who value high performance-to-price ratios.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product feature review with branding and purchase-influencing hooks like 'CP Value King'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: 3C Tim哥 (3c有意思tim哥) personal branding watermark and voice.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Professional tech influencer content with high density of technical jargon and rapid-fire feature demonstrations.
